text.title: Jira Workflow Management Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for the Jira Workflow Management artefact. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.note: issue_type missing workflow_id; status missing category; no transitions; no automation_rules; no shared_filters.

antipattern.description: Status set to an approved/sent state by the producing agent without a human reviewer entry.
Required field empty or replaced with a placeholder (n/a, unknown) without an anchored reason.
Prose paragraph stuffed into a field the schema declares as array or object.
